puzzle.title: The Elder's Unexpected Nourishment
puzzle.intro: In the sacred precincts of the House of Allah, an elderly servant of God experienced a profound mystery that defied all expectation. This devoted individual, long past the years of natural parenthood, witnessed something extraordinary that revealed the boundless mercy of the Divine. The puzzle lies in uncovering this forgotten moment from the lives of the prophets.
clues: My people were known as Israel, descendants of a great patriarch of old.
I spent my nights in prayer, prostrating before my Lord in the temple.
I was granted a son in my old age, a gift I never ceased to glorify Allah for.
My trial involved discovering a sustenance that appeared for a young soul under my care.
I was a prophet named Zakariyya, tasked with caring for Maryam in the Bayt al-Maqdis.
The answer lies in the verse where Allah accepted Maryam and provided sustenance for her.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The prophet who cared for Maryam in the temple
The prophet who built the sacred house
The prophet swallowed by a great fish
The prophet who fled from his people
The prophet who spoke to Allah directly
identity.answer: The prophet who cared for Maryam in the temple

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being tested with years of drought
Finding sustenance mysteriously provided for a young ward
Preaching to a nation that rejected divine guidance
Being thrown into a pit by one's own people
Receiving revelation through visions
trial.answer: Finding sustenance mysteriously provided for a young ward

location.label: Key Element
options: A ship built from planks and nails
The sacred temple of Jerusalem
A garden that was destroyed
A city built by a righteous king
The depths of the ocean

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The people believed and followed the messenger
Divine acceptance and mercy for those devoted to worship
The punishment came upon the disbelievers
A son was born in old age as promised
Safe passage through the wilderness
outcome.answer: Divine acceptance and mercy for those devoted to worship

puzzle.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلَهَا رَبُّهَا بِقَبُولٍ حَسَنٍۢ وَأَنۢبَتَهَا نَبَاتًا حَسَنًۭا وَكَفَّلَهَا زَكَرِيَّا ۖ كُلَّمَا دَخَلَ عَلَيْهَا زَكَرِيَّا ٱلْمِحْرَابَ وَجَدَ عِندَهَا رِزْقًۭا ۖ قَالَ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ أَنَّىٰ لَكِ هَـٰذَا ۖ قَالَتْ هُوَ مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرْزُقُ مَن يَشَآءُ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
puzzle.verse: So her Lord accepted her with good acceptance and caused her to grow in a good manner and put her in the care of Zechariah. Every time Zechariah entered upon her in the prayer chamber, he found with her provision. He said, "O Mary, from where is this [coming] to you?" She said, "It is from Allāh. Indeed, Allāh provides for whom He wills without account." (3:37)
